Coming back to this video 10 years later, now I actually know who Ann Coulter is. She is a brilliant woman who takes more shit than anybody just for being a female conservative who is brutally honest and doesn't apologize for it. The Left hates that she is a woman who fights against them (as the modern Left is a regressive hive mind which seeks to divide and conquer and control every social group except the working white man) and she actually has a spine--unlike most many Republican voices--so no intimidation will prevent her from speaking her mind, which the Left also hates because their modern ideology is to shame and remove people from speech platforms in order to eliminate non-Leftist voices.

It is actually quite sad that she ended up not getting married and having children. She was too focused on her career to raise a family and ended up losing the opportunity as she is now 50+ years old. Now I see her posting a lot of dog videos on Twitter. I fear that's the fate of many of today's women--living a childless life and clinging to the desire for children in their 40s and 50s by obsessing over dogs. From what I have gathered about her life, I don't think Ann is a happy person because of her lonely life, and I believe that many, many more American women will be experiencing a similar fate in the future. It saddens me.
